title: Polovtsian Dances the scrapped NGE OP theme
display_title: Polovtsian Dances the scrapped NGE OP theme
wikitext:
[]: Polovtsian Dances (the scrapped NGE OP theme)             Quote Post by alexprevity » Tue Feb 12, 2013 7:26 pm Hey! I tried to search around on here for more information (other than the liner notes from Refrain of Evangelion ) about Anno's wish to use Borodin's Polovtsian Dances as the opening theme for Neon Genesis Evangelion. It turns out that No. 17 "Gliding Dance of the Maidens" from this piece is very popular in anime. Many series, including Anno's Kare Kano , have used it in their soundtracks. You may also recognize it from DDR Extreme 2! Anyways, I decided to see what it would sound like on top of the OP. It works pretty well! It has kind of a similar feel to "Bande-annonce (garçons)" from the 3.0 OST. EDIT: YouTube hates me, so I uploaded it to my Vimeo account instead. https://vimeo.com/59542197 P.S. I apologize in advance if this post is in the wrong category, I'm new here... [/b]

[]:             Quote Post by dfer131 » Tue Feb 12, 2013 8:51 pm Video got pulled down hard....

[]:             Quote Post by alexprevity » Tue Feb 12, 2013 10:10 pm I know...the fixed link is up there now!

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Wed Feb 13, 2013 1:11 pm That's pretty cool. Makes me wonder what the OP would look like if it was specifically made to fit that song...

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Feb 13, 2013 3:50 pm Wow, really works nicely! Fun-fact: It was in fact used by Rahxephon too, haha Conspiracy-theories... START!

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Wed Feb 13, 2013 4:57 pm Wait, when was it used in RahXephon ? And why do I keep talking about that series when I don't even like it? EDIT: Thanks Mr. Tines. While I completely don't remember that song in the show, lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Feb 13, 2013 5:02 pm The Killer of Heroes wrote: Wait, when was it used in RahXephon ?

[]:             Quote Post by alexprevity » Wed Feb 13, 2013 5:12 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Quon's song, which I knew as "Stranger in Paradise".

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Feb 13, 2013 5:19 pm alexprevity wrote: "Strangers in Paradise" was from the 1953 musical Kismet , which was based off of the music of Alexander Borodin.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Wed Feb 13, 2013 6:27 pm Huh. I wasn't expecting this to be as good as the original was. but I quite liked the music. It lends a much more somber feeling to the entire opening, making it feel like a different work entirely.

[]:             Quote Post by user-02 » Wed Feb 13, 2013 8:49 pm It works well, but for some reason, it feels more appropriate for EoTV/EOE-timeline Evangelion than for the early to middle series. Musically, it doesn't match up quite as well to the tempo of the visuals as does the "Cruel Angel's Thesis" theme -- but that's probably because the latter was actually used, and the visuals were probably synched to it (or vice versa). Either way, it's an interesting fit.

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Wed Feb 13, 2013 10:53 pm I think it could have made a good ED theme myself. Better than Fly me to the Moon anyways, or whatever the song is called. Hey OP, what version of the song is this? I'd like to get it off of iTunes if possible.

[]:             Quote Post by alexprevity » Thu Feb 14, 2013 10:16 am The Killer of Heroes wrote: Hey OP, what version of the song is this? I'd like to get it off of iTunes if possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Thu Feb 14, 2013 7:29 pm I was not aware of this, I would loved to see such an opening. Regarding the video itself, there are a few cuts that sorta match up, but the overall footage is just too fast paced. In fact, I wonder if there are any other openings as fast paced as Evangelion's.

[]:             Quote Post by alexprevity » Thu Feb 14, 2013 8:49 pm Rodeo wrote: Regarding the video itself, there are a few cuts that sorta match up, but the overall footage is just too fast paced. In fact, I wonder if there are any other openings as fast paced as Evangelion's.

[]: Re: Polovtsian Dances (the scrapped NGE OP theme)             Quote Post by Capo98y » Sat Aug 19, 2023 2:58 pm Can you reaupload it? do you still have it?

[]: Re:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sat Aug 19, 2023 6:44 pm The Killer of Heroes wrote: Better than Fly me to the Moon anyways, or whatever the song is called.

You may also recognize it from DDR Extreme 2! Anyways, I decided to see what it would sound like on top of the OP. It works pretty well! It has kind of a similar feel to "Bande-annonce (garçons)" from the 3.0 OST. EDIT: YouTube hates me, so I uploaded it to my Vimeo account instead. https://vimeo.com/59542197 P.S.
